title: 懐かしのアイルランド料理

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Air Groove and Fine Motion during lunch
break.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For goodness's sake... It's one thing to send things
without asking, but I wish they'd consider the
limited space we have for storage.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Sorry for causing a fuss.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The things is, various shops with connections to
Ireland have been sending me packages...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are many Irish manufacturers and grocery
stores within Japan that support Fine Motion. On
one occasion, she received a huge amount of tea
leaves...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's soda bread, fig rolls, oat flapjacks, lamb
meat, and so much more!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it all looks positively scrumptious!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I know you're happy, but there's so much stuff in our room that I can barely move.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you intend to do with this stuff? You
can't hope to eat it all—and doing so wouldn't
leave you in great shape for a race anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
True... But everyone went to the trouble of
sending me these gifts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they want me to enjoy them. Not to
mention, I love Irish food, so I want to try each
and every one.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine—I'm an Umamusume! I could eat all of
this before the day's through if I put my mind to
it. ♪
choice_data_list:
I'm sure no one wants their gift to impact your
races.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're right! The best way to show my
appreciation for their support is to win my races.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll just do a little taste-testing and
donate the rest to the school cafeteria. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'd be thrilled if everyone had the opportunity to
try Ireland's delicious cuisine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hurray! Now that I have your approval, I just need
to focus on getting through it all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I'm going to fill up on all the Irish food
I've been missing today! Here I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fine Motion gobbles up several large
boxes worth of food!
